svg.text: Active (Pal 1) — passthrough: same value rewritten — no flicker
Inactive (Pal 0) — pre-loaded with line N+2 colors — safe in any column
Active (Pal 0) — passthrough: same value rewritten — no flicker
Inactive (Pal 1) — pre-loaded with line N+2 colors — safe in any column
BMP4: REP OUTSB vs BMP2: 12x individual OUTSB
12 separate OUTSB — each needs instruction fetch + decode + execute (~9 cy x 12 = ~108 cy data)
REP OUTSB (CX=12) — one fetch, 12 iterations in V40 microcode (~75 cy data). Finishes earlier.
Saves ~33 cycles/scanline — operation finishes sooner, leaving more headroom before next HBLANK.
Olivetti Prodest PC1 · Yamaha V6355D · NEC V40 @ 8 MHz · CGA Mode 4 · Flip-First / REP OUTSB — confirmed on real hardware
